risk_if_not_implemented: Without Session Integrity, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Transmission Integrity
compensating_control_1.description: Cryptographic mechanisms exist to protect the integrity of data being transmitted.
compensating_control_1.justification: Transmission Integrity (CRY-04) provides cryptographic protection that compensates for the absence of Session Integrity (NET-09) by ensuring data confidentiality and integrity through alternative technical means. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Non-Repudiation
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to utilize a non-repudiation capability to protect against an individual falsely denying having performed a particular action.
compensating_control_2.justification: Non-Repudiation (MON-09) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Session Integrity (NET-09) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
